title: Supervised Learning Path
description: Build fluency in Supervised Learning inside Learning Paradigms by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Active Learning
steps.summary: Active Learning belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Supervised Learning. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Supervised Learning. Start after Q-Learning and V-Learning. It opens into Active Learning Triage and Active Learning for RAG.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: SFT (Supervised Fine-Tuning)
steps.summary: SFT (Supervised Fine-Tuning) belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Supervised Learning. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Supervised Learning. Start after supervised fine-tuning and Fine Tuning.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Supervised Contrastive Learning (SupCon)
steps.summary: Supervised Contrastive Learning (SupCon) belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Supervised Learning. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Supervised Learning. Start after Supervised Learning and Contrastive Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Regression
steps.summary: Regression belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Supervised Learning. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Supervised Learning. Compare it with Regression Problem and Classification. It opens into Regression Problem and Zero-Inflated Regression.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Classification
steps.summary: Classification belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Supervised Learning. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Supervised Learning. Compare it with Classification Problem and Regression. It opens into Classification Problem and Few-Shot Classification.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: supervised fine-tuning
steps.summary: supervised fine-tuning belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Supervised Learning. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Supervised Learning. Start after Fine Tuning and P-Tuning. It opens into SFT (Supervised Fine-Tuning).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Dual supervised learning
steps.summary: Dual supervised learning belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Supervised Learning. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Supervised Learning. Start after Dual Learning and Supervised Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: SupCon (Supervised Contrastive) Loss
steps.summary: SupCon (Supervised Contrastive) Loss belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Supervised Learning. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Supervised Learning. Start after SupCon loss and Contrastive Loss.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
